context.summary: Fresh current proof that Tau can route through more than one bounded non-human command-spec agent before returning to human.

result.summary: Tau should verify preserved goal routing and then run the project-or-harness verifier.
evidence: Previous same-run watchdog apply transport proof exists.
This proof intentionally uses dry-run GitHub projection to isolate multi-step non-human routing.

rationale: A fresh multi-step non-human loop receipt is needed before stronger agentic harness claims.

next_agent.name: goal-guardian
next_agent.reason: Goal guardian must verify the immutable goal hash before another non-human verifier route.

required_evidence: Command-loop receipt with goal-guardian followed by project-or-harness-verifier.
Each selected agent exits 0 and emits tau.agent_handoff.v1.
stop_condition: Project-or-harness verifier routes to human or Tau fails closed.
